title: Simply Instamine: Deepslate
description: This is a servermod/plugin that makes it possible to insta mine deepslate
body: Simply Instamine: Deepslate is a lightweight utility mod for Fabric that brings the satisfying "instamine" mechanic to Deepslate. In vanilla Minecraft, Deepslate is intentionally designed to be tougher than regular stone, making large-scale underground excavation a slow and tedious process. This mod removes that barrier for endgame players!
